sentences.target: Il reste indifférent à mes messages.

translations.fr: Il reste indifférent à mes messages.
translations.en: He stays indifferent to my messages.
translations.de: Er bleibt meinen Nachrichten gegenüber gleichgültig.
translations.zh-Hans: 他对我的信息依然无动于衷。
translations.yue: 佢對我嘅訊息依然無動於衷。
translations.ru: Он остаётся равнодушным к моим сообщениям.
translations.pt: Ele continua indiferente às minhas mensagens.
translations.vi: Anh ấy vẫn thờ ơ với tin nhắn của tôi.
translations.nl: Hij blijft onverschillig voor mijn berichten.
translations.uk: Він залишається байдужим до моїх повідомлень.
translations.hu: Továbbra is közömbös az üzeneteim iránt.
translations.hi: वह मेरे संदेशों के प्रति उदासीन रहता है.
translations.pl: On pozostaje obojętny na moje wiadomości.
translations.nb: Han forblir likegyldig overfor meldingene mine.
translations.id: Dia tetap tidak peduli pada pesanku.
translations.sv: Han förblir likgiltig inför mina meddelanden.
translations.ro: El rămâne indiferent la mesajele mele.
translations.da: Han forbliver ligeglad med mine beskeder.
translations.ja: 彼は私のメッセージに相変わらず無関心だ。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person masculine singular; syntactic subject of the verb.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; used quasi-copular to link the subject with the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective (subject complement), masculine singular; agrees with the subject and denotes a state.
Preposition introducing an indirect complement; marks the target of the indifference.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, plural form; modifies ‘messages’.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the preposition ‘à’ forming the prepositional complement.

sentences.target: Je ne veux pas paraître indifférente.

translations.fr: Je ne veux pas paraître indifférente.
translations.en: I don't want to seem indifferent.
translations.yue: 我唔想俾人覺得我冷漠。
translations.vi: Tôi không muốn tỏ ra thờ ơ.
translations.ar: لا أريد أن أبدو غير مبالية.
translations.id: Aku tidak ingin terlihat acuh tak acuh.
translations.ja: 無関心に見られたくない。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of ‘veux’.
Clitic negation particle; first element of discontinuous negation ‘ne … pas’ placed before the verb.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; modal verb of volition selecting an infinitival complement.
Negative adverb; second element of ‘ne … pas’ scoping over the VP.
Infinitive verb; complement of ‘veux’, expressing the intended appearance; forms a small clause with the following adjective.
Predicate adjective (subject complement of the infinitive), feminine singular; agrees with the understood subject ‘Je’.

sentences.target: Vous restez indifférents devant ce film.

translations.fr: Vous restez indifférents devant ce film.
translations.en: You remain indifferent to this movie.
translations.es: Ustedes siguen indiferentes ante esta película.
translations.de: Ihr bleibt gegenüber diesem Film gleichgültig.
translations.it: Rimanete indifferenti davanti a questo film.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们对这部电影依然无动于衷。
translations.yue: 你哋對呢套戲依然無動於衷。
translations.ru: Вы остаётесь равнодушными к этому фильму.
translations.pt: Vocês continuam indiferentes a este filme.
translations.vi: Các bạn vẫn thờ ơ với bộ phim này.
translations.ar: ما زلتم غير مبالين بهذا الفيلم.
translations.nl: Jullie blijven onverschillig tegenover deze film.
translations.uk: Ви залишаєтеся байдужими до цього фільму.
translations.hu: Továbbra is közömbösek vagytok ezzel a filmmel szemben.
translations.hi: आप लोग इस फ़िल्म के प्रति अब भी उदासीन हैं.
translations.el: Παραμένετε αδιάφοροι απέναντι σε αυτήν την ταινία.
translations.nb: Dere forblir likegyldige overfor denne filmen.
translations.id: Kalian tetap tidak peduli terhadap film ini.
translations.sv: Ni förblir likgiltiga inför den här filmen.
translations.ro: Rămâneți indiferenți față de acest film.
translations.da: I forbliver ligeglade over for denne film.
translations.fi: Te pysytte välinpitämättöminä tätä elokuvaa kohtaan.
translations.ja: あなたたちはこの映画に相変わらず無関心だ。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person (plural or formal singular); syntactic subject of ‘restez’. Here plural agreement is indicated by the adjective.
Finite verb, present indicative, 2nd person plural; quasi-copular linking to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective (subject complement), masculine plural; agrees with ‘Vous’ (plural).
Preposition introducing a circumstantial prepositional phrase; marks spatial/figurative relation.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies ‘film’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘devant’ and head of the noun phrase.

translations.it: Il tuo messaggio lo lascia indifferente.
translations.ko: 네 메시지는 그에게 아무런 느낌도 주지 못한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的消息让他无动于衷。
translations.yue: 你嘅訊息令佢無動於衷。
translations.vi: Tin nhắn của bạn khiến anh ấy thờ ơ.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा संदेश उस पर कोई असर नहीं करता.
translations.el: Το μήνυμά σου τον αφήνει αδιάφορο.
translations.nb: Meldingen din lar ham være likegyldig.
translations.ja: 君のメッセージは彼に響かない。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular; modifies ‘message’.
Common noun, masculine singular; grammatical subject of ‘laisse’.
Clitic direct object pronoun, 3rd person masculine singular; precedes the verb and serves as the direct object of ‘laisse’.
Finite transitive verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; causative construction ‘laisser + object + adjective’.
Object predicative adjective (attribut du COD), masculine singular; characterizes the object ‘le’.
